title: prangos herderi subsp. herderi
intro: Prangos herderi subsp. herderi is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), commonly found in the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation. The roots and rhizomes of the plant have been found to possess health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against certain infections. Prangos herderi subsp. herderi can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
